projectDescription: A web application that helps Boston University students find available classrooms to study in by displaying real-time room availability across campus buildings.
keyFeatures: Real-time classroom availability for 77 classrooms across CAS and CGS buildings
Search by building code or room number
Automatic data updates based on business hours
publicApiSurface: GET /api/open-classrooms - Returns all classroom availability organized by building
POST /api/refresh - Triggers manual data refresh with 30-minute cooldown
GET /api/cooldown-status - Returns current cooldown status and remaining time
GET /api/last-updated - Returns timestamp of last data update
